data.title: TBC Bank Group Sets May Date for 2026 Annual General Meeting in London
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from TBC Bank ( (GB:TBCG) ).

TBC Bank Group PLC, a FTSE 250 constituent listed in London, operates leading digital banking and financial ecosystems in Georgia and Central Asia through its subsidiaries TBC Bank Georgia and TBC Uzbekistan. The group targets retail and corporate clients, leveraging mobile-first platforms, strong market shares in Georgian loans and deposits, and a large registered user base in Uzbekistan.

TBC Bank Group PLC has published and distributed the notice and proxy materials for its 2026 Annual General Meeting following the release of its 2025 Annual Report. The AGM will take place on 19 May 2026 at Baker McKenzie’s London offices, providing shareholders with a formal forum to review performance, vote on resolutions and engage with the board on the group’s strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:TBCG) stock is a Buy with a £57.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on TBC Bank stock, see the GB:TBCG Stock Forecast page.

More about TBC Bank

TBC Bank Group PLC is a London-listed financial services holding company focused on digitally led banking for retail and corporate customers in Georgia and Uzbekistan. Through TBC Bank Georgia it holds leading national market shares in loans and deposits, while TBC Uzbekistan operates a major digital financial ecosystem including the country’s largest mobile-only bank and popular payment and instalment platforms.

Average Trading Volume: 109,724

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £2.78B

data.title: American Critical Minerals Names Veteran Dean Pekeski as CEO Ahead of Green River Drilling
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

New Tech Lithium Corp ( (TSE:KCLI) ) has issued an announcement.

American Critical Minerals has appointed industry veteran Dean Pekeski as CEO, president and director, while former CEO Simon Clarke transitions to chairman. Pekeski brings over three decades of mining experience, including leading major potash brine projects in Saskatchewan and Utah, and a track record of advancing assets through technical studies, permitting, offtake contracts and financing.

The company says Pekeski’s deep technical expertise in solution mining and critical brine processing, as well as his capital markets and government relationships, will be instrumental as it prepares to launch its inaugural drilling program at the Green River potash and lithium project. Management views the hire as a key step in validating historic data, unlocking the project’s multi-commodity potential and strengthening its position in U.S. critical minerals development.

More about New Tech Lithium Corp

American Critical Minerals Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on developing potash, lithium, and bromine resources in the U.S., particularly in Utah’s Paradox Basin. Its flagship Green River Project targets domestically important critical minerals near existing production and advanced peer projects, positioning the company within the strategic critical minerals supply chain.

Average Trading Volume: 106,880

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$20.01M

Microbix Biosystms ( (TSE:MBX) ) has shared an announcement.

Microbix Biosystems Inc., a Mississauga-based life sciences innovator, manufactures antigens for immunoassays and quality assessment products such as QAPs and QUANTDx for clinical laboratories, diagnostics companies, and accreditation bodies worldwide. The company is ISO 9001 and 13485 accredited, registered with multiple regulators including the U.S. FDA and Health Canada, and also develops other proprietary products such as the Kinlytic urokinase thrombolytic drug and DxTM reagents for diagnostic testing.

Microbix announced it will attend and present at the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference in Toronto on April 21–22, where its COO will deliver a group presentation and senior executives will hold one-on-one meetings with investors. The conference appearance is positioned to deepen Microbix’s engagement with Canadian, U.S., and international healthcare investors, potentially broadening its capital markets profile and supporting its strategic growth within the diagnostics and biopharmaceutical sectors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MBX) stock is a Buy with a C$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbix Biosystms stock, see the TSE:MBX Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MBX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weakened financial performance (return to losses and negative cash flow) and only mildly supportive technicals (negative MACD and below longer-term averages). To see Spark’s full report on MBX stock, click here.

Microbix Biosystems Inc. is a Canadian life sciences company that creates proprietary biological products for human health, employing over 120 staff and generating C$18.6 million in revenue in fiscal 2025. It supplies critical ingredients and devices for the global diagnostics industry, including antigens for immunoassays and its QAPs and QUANTDx product lines, which support clinical lab proficiency testing, assay development, and diagnostic workflow quality in more than 30 countries.

data.description:

Medallion Resources ( (TSE:GAMA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Gamma Resources has launched a warrant incentive program to encourage the early exercise of up to 9,250,000 existing warrants issued in 2024, offering investors one new three-year warrant with a $0.15 strike price for each warrant exercised during a limited window ending May 14, 2026. The company plans to use any proceeds for general working capital and to advance exploration, while unexercised warrants will retain their original terms and insider participation will be treated as a related-party transaction under securities rules, potentially strengthening Gamma’s balance sheet and funding position if uptake is strong.

More about Medallion Resources

Gamma Resources Ltd. is a U.S.-focused uranium exploration and development company with projects in the Mountain West region, including the Green River Project in Utah and the Mesa Arc Project in New Mexico, where it holds historic uranium resources in the Chama Basin. The company aims to capitalize on growing policy and market support for nuclear energy by supplying responsibly sourced, U.S.-based uranium, and its shares trade in Toronto, on the OTCQB, and in Frankfurt.

data.title: Canadian Premium Sand Launches Strategic Review to Unlock Intrinsic Value
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Canadian Premium Sand Inc ( (TSE:CPS) ).

Canadian Premium Sand Inc. has launched a strategic review to explore options to close the gap between its market valuation and the intrinsic value of its silica sand and glass-related assets. The review, backed unanimously by the board, management and major shareholders, will consider a wide range of possibilities including mergers, asset sales, partnerships, financings, or continuing on its current standalone plan.

The company’s core Manitoba asset comprises a large measured and indicated silica sand resource, including a significant low-iron subset suitable for solar-grade and other glass products, supported by environmental licenses for sand extraction and a proposed solar glass plant. CPS has formed a special committee of independent directors and hired financial and legal advisors to run a deliberate process, while committing to maintain operational focus and retain and incentivize its leadership and staff during this period of strategic evaluation.

Spark’s Take on CPS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CPS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, negative cash flow) and balance-sheet stress (negative equity and higher debt). Technicals are only modestly supportive with mixed momentum, while valuation signals are constrained by negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on CPS stock, click here.

More about Canadian Premium Sand Inc

Canadian Premium Sand Inc. is a Canadian industrial minerals company focused on developing its Wanipigow silica sand resource in Manitoba. The company targets supplying fracture proppant to the Western Canada Sedimentary Basin and high-purity, low-iron silica sand for solar and float glass manufacturing, positioning itself in both energy and advanced glass markets.

Average Trading Volume: 30,213

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: New Age Metals Expands Ontario PGM Footprint With Gravel Ridge Option
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

New Age Metals ( (TSE:NAM) ) just unveiled an update.

New Age Metals Inc. has entered into an option agreement to acquire a 100% interest in the Gravel Ridge PGM Property near the Lac des Îles Mine in northwestern Ontario, expanding its Platreef PGM Project. The deal adds about 740 hectares to its land position, bringing the Platreef package to roughly 17,630 hectares in a district anchored by Canada’s only primary palladium mine and strong regional infrastructure.

The Gravel Ridge property lies within the Lac des Îles intrusive complex, interpreted as prospective for intrusion-hosted PGM–nickel–copper mineralization with multiple untested or underexplored geophysical and intrusive targets. The acquisition strengthens New Age Metals’ PGM pipeline alongside its River Valley, Northern Shield, Platreef and Genesis assets, and the company plans ongoing engagement with local First Nations as it advances systematic exploration in line with national critical minerals priorities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NAM) stock is a Buy with a C$1.04 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on New Age Metals stock, see the TSE:NAM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAM is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, operating losses, and negative free cash flow), despite low leverage on the balance sheet. Technicals are mildly bearish with price below key moving averages and a negative MACD. Valuation is also a headwind given the very high P/E and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on NAM stock, click here.

More about New Age Metals

New Age Metals Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on platinum group metals projects in Ontario and Alaska, including its flagship River Valley Project, the Platreef and Escape East projects in Ontario, and the Genesis project in Alaska. The company targets palladium, platinum, nickel and copper within established mining districts supported by strong infrastructure and aligned with Canada’s critical minerals strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 173,483

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$24.78M

data.title: Americas Gold and Silver Posts Record Q1 2026 Silver Output and Advances Galena Upgrades
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Americas Gold and Silver ( (TSE:USA) ) has shared an announcement.

Americas Gold and Silver reported that in the first quarter of 2026 it achieved record consolidated silver production of 787,000 ounces, up 76% from a year earlier, and record sales of 830,000 ounces, supported by strong output of lead, copper and antimony and a cash balance of US$122.6 million. The company also marked one year without Lost Time Accidents at its Cosalá and Galena operations, while executing major growth projects at Galena, including Phase 2 shaft upgrades, a new surface paste fill plant and its largest-ever drilling program, reinforcing its 2026 production guidance and long-term growth trajectory.

These operational gains and safety milestones underscore Americas’ strategy of aggressively ramping up production capacity and automation at its flagship U.S. and Mexican mines. By advancing infrastructure upgrades, mine-wide communications, and exploration drilling while maintaining a solid balance sheet, the company is strengthening its competitive position in silver and antimony and signaling potential benefits for investors and regional supply chains.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:USA) stock is a Buy with a C$10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Americas Gold and Silver stock, see the TSE:USA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on USA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, USA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (large losses and substantial negative free cash flow) and bearish technical signals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting this, the latest earnings call points to a credible operational ramp and production growth plan backed by financing, but near-term capex intensity and continued losses keep the overall risk profile elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on USA stock, click here.

More about Americas Gold and Silver

Americas Gold and Silver is a North American mining company producing silver, copper, lead and antimony from high‑grade operations in the U.S. and Mexico. Following acquisitions of the Galena Complex and Crescent Silver Mine and a joint venture with US Antimony, it aims to be a leading regional silver producer and key U.S. antimony supplier.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.73B

data.title: Hope Life International Revamps Board and Audit Leadership
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Hope Life International Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1683) ) is now available.

Hope Life International Holdings Ltd. has announced a series of boardroom changes effective 16 April 2026, including the resignation of executive director Li Ka Chun Gordon and independent non-executive director Chan Wai Yan, who also stepped down as chair of the audit committee and member of the nomination committee, both citing other business commitments and no disagreement with the board. To maintain its governance structure and regulatory compliance, the company has appointed 33-year-old finance professional Nathan Pau as an independent non-executive director, chairman of the audit committee and member of the nomination committee on a three-year term, bringing over a decade of international accounting and auditing experience to strengthen oversight and board independence.

The board emphasized that there are no other matters related to the resignations that need to be brought to shareholders’ or the exchange’s attention, suggesting a smooth transition rather than a signal of internal dispute. With Pau’s background at major listed corporations and a global audit firm, the reshuffle is likely aimed at reinforcing the company’s financial governance and committee leadership, which may reassure investors concerned about continuity in audit and nomination oversight.

More about Hope Life International Holdings Ltd.

Hope Life International Holdings Ltd. is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The group operates through various subsidiaries, though the announcement focuses primarily on corporate governance and board composition rather than its underlying business operations or specific market segment.

Average Trading Volume: 3,382,210

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$442.3M
